state.coderResponse:
All validation gates pass. The implementation is complete.

## Summary

I executed PRP **P1_M7_T3_S2** — adding the `stagehand config` command tree (FR38) — in one pass, following the existing `providers.go`/`providers_test.go` sibling patterns exactly.

### Files created/modified

| File | Status | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `internal/config/example.go` | NEW | `ExampleConfig() string` — the fully-commented PRD §16.2 template (Mode A reference), values = `Default*` constants |
| `internal/config/example_test.go` | NEW | white-box `package config`: `TestExampleConfig_ParsesToDefaults` (strip `#`→`fileDTO`→asserts `Default*`) + `TestExampleConfig_DocumentsEveryKey` |
| `cmd/stagehand/config.go` | NEW | `config` parent + `init` (local `--force`) + `path` children; registers via `init()` so `main.go` is untouched; hermetic `writeExampleConfig`/`offerGitignore`/`isYes` helpers |
| `cmd/stagehand/config_test.go` | NEW | white-box `package main`: MOCKING contract (XDG/HOME/unset path; writes+parses-to-defaults; no-clobber; `--force`; gitignore y/n/no-repo; tree-registered) |
| `docs/CONFIGURATION.md` | MODIFIED | additive `## 7. Onboarding` section (cross-links key tables, no duplication) |

### Validation gates (all green)
- **L1** gofmt clean · **L2** `go vet` clean · **L3** `go build ./...` OK
- **L4** `TestExampleConfig` ✓ · **L5** `TestConfig` ✓ · **L6** `go test ./...` all 7 packages ✓
- **L7** `config path` → `~/.config/stagehand/config.toml`
- **L8** `XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$(mktemp -d) config init` writes template (exit 0); second run without `--force` errors (exit 1); `--force` overwrites (exit 0)

### Key design decision
The template uses `# ` for uncomment-to-activate settings and `## ` for permanent prose/headers. Stripping one `#` leaves prose as valid TOML comments, so the whole template parses back to `config.Default()` (the core MOCKING contract) while every line remains a comment (documented no-op). This is documented in the `ExampleConfig` doc comment. Imports stay thin (`fmt/io/os/bufio/path/filepath/strings` + cobra + `internal/config`; **no** `internal/git`/`internal/generate`), and `main.go` was not modified (tree self-registers via `init()`).

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "PRP P1_M7.T3.S2 implemented in one pass. Added internal/config/example.go (ExampleConfig — fully-commented §16.2 template) + white-box example_test.go (parses back to Default* constants); added cmd/stagehand/config.go (config init/path tree, self-registered via init() so main.go is untouched, local --force flag, hermetic writeExampleConfig/offerGitignore/isYes helpers) + white-box config_test.go covering the full MOCKING contract (XDG/HOME/unset path, writes-valid-TOML-parsing-to-defaults, no-clobber, --force overwrite, gitignore y/n/no-repo); appended an additive '## 7. Onboarding' section to docs/CONFIGURATION.md (Mode A pointer, no key-table duplication). All 8 validation gates pass: gofmt clean, go vet clean, go build ./... OK, TestExampleConfig + TestConfig + go test ./... all green, and both smoke tests (config path; XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$(mktemp -d) config init with no-clobber + --force) behave per spec. config.go imports only fmt/io/os/bufio/path/filepath/strings + cobra + internal/config (no internal/git/generate). A stray stagehand binary produced by an intermediate go build ./cmd/stagehand/ was restored via git checkout."
}
```
